title: Abstract Reasoning Test
text:
# Abstract Reasoning Test

Test real-world Abstract Reasoning skills that matter in a world with AI. Protected by AI proctoring.

## For jobseekers

Practice your skills and earn a certificate of achievement when you score in the top 25%.

Take a Practice Test

## For companies

Screen real Abstract Reasoning skills, flag human or AI assistance, and interview the right people.

Create an Abstract Reasoning Screening Test

From $7 per candidate

## About the test

The Abstract Reasoning test requires viewing diagrams, identifying patterns within them, and choosing diagrams that fit the patterns.

This test evaluates abstract visual reasoning skills with tasks applicable to the workplace including:

* Identifying additive elements to recognize how parts combine.
* Spotting duplicate elements to find repeating sequences.
* Interpreting abstract visualizations for underlying numeric patterns.

The majority of today's office-based jobs require the ability to come to logical conclusions. The ability to recognize abstract visual logic can distinguish excellent from average employees.
